zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Tyrrell於大約1461年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping54歲，母親Margaret Darcy38歲。她於大約1484年與Sir Edmund I Knyvett在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1514年4月在英國倫敦享年54歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Tyrrell于大约1461年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping54岁，母亲Margaret Darcy38岁。她于大约1484年与Sir Edmund I Knyvett在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1514年4月在英国倫敦享年54岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Tyrrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): perhaps a nickname from a derivative of Old French tirer ‘to pull’, in the same sense as French Tirand ‘one who pulls on the reins’, hence ‘obstinate, stubborn’. This name may have become confused with Turrell . A branch of this Anglo-Norman family has been in Ireland since the 12th century. Its name has been Gaelicized as Tirial.
English: habitational name from Tirril (Cumbria), which derives from Old Norse tyri ‘resinous wood’ + erg ‘shieling’.

variants.name: Terrel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Terrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Tirrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Terrill
meanings: English (Cornwall; of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Turrell
meanings: most frequently an Anglo-Norman French pronunciation of Thorold (Old Norse Thóraldr, from the elements Thórr ‘Thor’ + valdr ‘power, rule’). This name and that in 2 may have become confused with Tyrrell .
from Middle English T(h)urild (Old Norse Thórhildr, Thorild, the latter a rare woman's name from the divine name Thórr ‘Thor’ + hildr ‘battle’).

variants.name: Tyrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Trill
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by the turnstile at the entrance to a village.
English (Sussex, also Kent): nickname, perhaps from Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (origin unknown, but perhaps Old English tyrl).

English (Sussex, also Kent) and Welsh: habitational name from one or more places named with Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (Old English tyrl), often used to describe moving water, such as Trill in Axminster (Devon), Tirle Brook (Gloucestershire and Worcestershire), and Trill Mill Brook (Oxfordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Tyrrell was born about 1461, in England, her father, Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping, was 54 and her mother, Margaret Darcy, was 38. She married Sir Edmund I Knyvett about 1484, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in April 1514, in London, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Tyrrell est née environ 1461, à Angleterre, son père, Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Margaret Darcy, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edmund I Knyvett environ 1484, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1514, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Tyrrell um 1461 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping 54 und ihre Mutter Margaret Darcy 38. Sie hat um 1484 in England Sir Edmund I Knyvett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1514 im Alter von 54 Jahren in London, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Tyrrell è nata il circa 1461 nel England, sua padre, Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Margaret Darcy, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edmund I Knyvett circa 1484, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1514, nel London, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Tyrrellが約1461年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir William Tyrrell of Gippingは54歳，母Margaret Darcyは38歳であった。約1484年にイギリスでSir Edmund I Knyvettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1514年4月にイギリスロンドンで54歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Tyrrell(이)가 대략 1461년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Darcy(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1484년 영국에서 Sir Edmund I Knyvett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1514년 4월 영국 런던에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.Buckenham Castle, Wayland, Norfolk, Engl: Wayland, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Tyrrell nasceu aproximadamente 1461, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Darcy, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edmund I Knyvett aproximadamente 1484, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1514, em London, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Tyrrell родилась около 1461 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Darcy, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmund I Knyvett около 1484 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла апрель 1514 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Tyrrell nació aproximadamente 1461, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Margaret Darcy, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Edmund I Knyvett aproximadamente 1484, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en abril de 1514, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
